param.name: source
param.label: CARD database source
param.option: Use a database installed by the administrator

param.name: cached_card
param.label: CARD database
param.help: Select a pre-installed CARD release. Contact your Galaxy administrator if none are listed.

validator.message: No CARD databases are installed. Ask your administrator to install one, or supply files from your history.

param.name: annotation_model
param.label: Annotation model type
param.help: Controls which annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard AMR gene identification. 'All model types' loads the extended annotation database covering protein variant, rRNA variant, knockout, and overexpression models — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: card_json
param.label: card.json
param.help: The card.json file downloaded from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download.

param.name: annotation_model
param.label: Annotation model type
param.help: Controls which annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard AMR gene identification. 'All model types' loads the extended annotation database covering protein variant, rRNA variant, knockout, and overexpression models — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: card_annotation
param.label: CARD annotation FASTA — homolog models
param.help: card_database_v*.fasta, created with rgi card_annotation. Required for rgi bwt alignment and when using Include wildcard variants.

param.name: card_annotation_all_models
param.label: CARD annotation FASTA — all models
param.help: card_database_v*_all.fasta, created with rgi card_annotation. Required when using --include_other_models.

param.name: card_version
param.label: CARD version string
param.help: Version of the CARD data being loaded, e.g. 3.2.9.

validator.message: Version should be digits and dots only, e.g. 3.2.9

param.name: source
param.label: WildCARD variant database
param.option: Use a database installed by the administrator

param.name: cached_wildcard
param.label: WildCARD database
param.help: Select a pre-installed WildCARD release. Contact your Galaxy administrator if none are listed.

validator.message: No WildCARD databases are installed. Ask your administrator to install one, or supply files from your history.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_model
param.label: WildCARD annotation model type
param.help: Controls which WildCARD annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard variant detection. 'All model types' loads the extended WildCARD annotation database — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_model
param.label: WildCARD annotation model type
param.help: Controls which WildCARD annotation FASTA is passed to rgi load. 'Homolog models only' is sufficient for standard variant detection. 'All model types' loads the extended WildCARD annotation database — required when using Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_annotation
param.label: WildCARD annotation FASTA — homolog models
param.help: wildcard_database_v*.fasta, created with rgi wildcard_annotation. Required to use Include wildcard variants.

param.name: wildcard_annotation_all_models
param.label: WildCARD annotation FASTA — all models
param.help: wildcard_database_v*_all.fasta, created with rgi wildcard_annotation. Required when combining Include wildcard variants with Include other model types.

param.name: wildcard_version
param.label: WildCARD version string
param.help: Version of the WildCARD data being loaded, e.g. 4.0.0.

validator.message: Version should be digits and dots only, e.g. 4.0.0

macros.token: #if str($card_source.source) == "cached" #set $card_json_path = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_json) #set $card_annotation = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_annotation) #set $card_annotation_all_models = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_annotation_all_models) #set $card_version = str($card_source.cached_card.fields.card_version) #set $annotation_model = str($card_source.annotation_model) #else #set $card_json_path = str($card_source.card_json) #set $annotation_model = str($card_source.card_annot.annotation_model) #if str($annotation_model) == "homolog" #if $card_source.card_annot.card_annotation #set $card_annotation = str($card_source.card_annot.card_annotation) #else #set $card_annotation = "" #end if #set $card_annotation_all_models = "" #else #set $card_annotation = "" #if $card_source.card_annot.card_annotation_all_models #set $card_annotation_all_models = str($card_source.card_annot.card_annotation_all_models) #else #set $card_annotation_all_models = "" #end if #end if #set $card_version = str($card_source.card_version).strip() #end if -i '$card_json_path' #if str($annotation_model) == "homolog" #if $card_annotation.strip() --card_annotation '$card_annotation' #end if #else #if $card_annotation_all_models.strip() --card_annotation_all_models '$card_annotation_all_models' #end if #end if #if $card_version.strip() --card_version '$card_version' #end if

#if str($wildcard_source.source) == "cached" #set $wc_model = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annotation_model) #set $wc_annotation = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_annotation) #set $wc_annotation_all = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_annotation_all_models) #set $wc_index = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_index) #set $wc_version = str($wildcard_source.cached_wildcard.fields.wildcard_version) #elif str($wildcard_source.source) == "history" #set $wc_model = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_model) #if str($wc_model) == "homolog" #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation #set $wc_annotation = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation) #else #set $wc_annotation = "" #end if #set $wc_annotation_all = "" #else #set $wc_annotation = "" #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_all_models #set $wc_annotation_all = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_annot.wildcard_annotation_all_models) #else #set $wc_annotation_all = "" #end if #end if #if $wildcard_source.wildcard_index #set $wc_index = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_index) #else #set $wc_index = "" #end if #set $wc_version = str($wildcard_source.wildcard_version).strip() #end if #if str($wildcard_source.source) != "none" #if str($wc_model) == "homolog" #if $wc_annotation.strip() --wildcard_annotation '$wc_annotation' #end if #else #if $wc_annotation_all.strip() --wildcard_annotation_all_models '$wc_annotation_all' #end if #end if #if $wc_index.strip() --wildcard_index '$wc_index' #end if #if $wc_version.strip() --wildcard_version '$wc_version' #end if #end if
